nameMeanings.name: Kieffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Luxembourgish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Kiefer . The surname Kieffer is also found in the province of Luxembourg and elsewhere in Wallonia (Belgium).

variants.name: Kiefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Franz, Erwin, Heinz, Dieter, Fritz, Alois, Aloys, Claus, Ernst, Florian, Frieda.
German: occupational name for a cooper or the overseer of a wine cellar, from an agent derivative of Middle High German kuofe ‘vat, barrel’ (from Latin cupa).
German: possibly also from an agent derivative of Middle High German kiffen ‘to quarrel’, hence a nickname for a bickerer.

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Jacob Kieffer was born about 1610, in Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany, his father, Lorentz Kieffer, was 33 and his mother, Maria Schaefer, was 33. He had at least 6 sons with Katherina.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Jacob Kieffer est né environ 1610, à Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Allemagne, son père, Lorentz Kieffer, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maria Schaefer, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Katherina.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hans Jacob Kieffer um 1610 in Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lorentz Kieffer 33 und seine Mutter Maria Schaefer 33. Er hatte mit Katherina mindestens 6 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Jacob Kieffer è nato il circa 1610 nel Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Germania, il suo padre, Lorentz Kieffer, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Maria Schaefer, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Katherina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Kiefferが約1610年にドイツバデンクレイス カルルスルヘで生まれた時，父Lorentz Kiefferは33歳，母Maria Schaeferは33歳であった。彼はKatherinaとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Kieffer(이)가 대략 1610년 독일 바든 크레이스 칼스루헤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lorentz Kieffer(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Schaefer(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Katherina(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Jacob Kieffer nasceu aproximadamente 1610, em Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemanha, seu pai, Lorentz Kieffer, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maria Schaefer, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Katherina.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Jacob Kieffer родился около 1610 г. в местности крис карлсрух, баден, Германия, его отцу по имени Lorentz Kieffer было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Schaefer, 33. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Katherina.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hans Jacob Kieffer nació aproximadamente 1610, en Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemania, su papá, Lorentz Kieffer, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Maria Schaefer, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Katherina.
